ddls:
CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm type (e.g., sorting, searching) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the algorithm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the algorithm was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the algorithm was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the algorithm */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the algorithm */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the algorithm (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithms_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES algorithm_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_tag_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_tag_map_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_tag_map_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES algorithm_tags ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm */,
  "n" INTEGER /* Input size (n) */,
  "f_n" REAL /* Average milliseconds (f(n)) */,
  "rate_of_growth" REAL /* Rate of growth */,
  "log_n" REAL /* Logarithmic value of n (Log(n)) */,
  "log_f_n" REAL /* Logarithmic value of f(n) (Log(f(n))) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the performance metric was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the performance metric was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the performance metric */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the performance metric */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the version was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, disabled) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the algorithm */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the algorithm was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the access event was recorded */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the algorithm */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_versions" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_versions_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_versions_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_performance" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_performance_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_performance_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)
